---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for SwarmAI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Include API sketches, YAML examples, or architecture ideas.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Module
Which module would this affect?
- [ ] swarmai-core
- [ ] swarmai-tools
- [ ] swarmai-dsl
- [ ] swarmai-enterprise
- [ ] swarmai-eval
- [ ] swarmai-rl
- [ ] swarmai-studio
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Any references, competitor features, or related issues.
